name.zh: 印度理工学院孟买分校

desc.en: India's premier engineering institution. Sundar Pichai (Google CEO) alumni.
desc.zh: 印度顶级工程学府，谷歌CEO皮查伊母校。

climate.zh: 孟买热带气候。全年高温（24-33°C），6-9月季风暴雨。湿度高。
climate.en: Mumbai tropical climate. Hot year-round (24-33°C), monsoon rains Jun-Sep. High humidity.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍（Hostel）极便宜，约₹5000-10000/月（约$60-120）。所有学生强制住校。
housing.en: On-campus hostels very cheap, ~₹5000-10000/month (~$60-120). All students required to live on campus.

employment.zh: 印度顶尖理工学院。毕业生被Google、微软、高盛等全球企业争相录用。起薪极高。
employment.en: India's top engineering institute. Graduates recruited by Google, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs globally. Very high starting salaries.

healthcare.zh: 校内有医院和健康中心。建议额外购买保险。印度医疗费用低。
healthcare.en: Campus hospital and health center. Additional insurance recommended. India's medical costs are low.

application.zh: 国际生通过DASA或学校官网申请。需SAT/JEE成绩、高中成绩单。竞争极其激烈。
application.en: International students apply via DASA or website. SAT/JEE scores, transcripts required. Extremely competitive.

safetyDetail.zh: IIT Bombay校园在Powai湖畔，环境优美安全。孟买大城市需注意安全。
safetyDetail.en: IIT Bombay campus by Powai Lake—beautiful and safe. Mumbai big city requires safety awareness.

name.zh: 印度理工学院德里分校

desc.en: India's top engineering school in the capital. Ultra-competitive admission.
desc.zh: 印度首都顶级工程学校，录取竞争极为激烈。

climate.zh: 新德里极端气候。夏季酷热（35-45°C），冬季寒冷有雾（5-15°C），10-11月空气质量差。
climate.en: New Delhi extreme climate. Scorching summers (35-45°C), cold foggy winters (5-15°C), poor air quality Oct-Nov.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍强制住校，约₹5000-10000/月。

employment.zh: 印度顶尖IIT之一。毕业生被全球科技和金融企业大量招聘。
employment.en: One of India's top IITs. Graduates recruited heavily by global tech and finance companies.

healthcare.zh: 校内有医疗中心。德里有大量优质医院。
healthcare.en: Campus medical center. Delhi has many quality hospitals.

application.zh: 国际生通过DASA申请。需SAT/JEE成绩。
application.en: International students apply via DASA. SAT/JEE scores required.

safetyDetail.zh: IIT Delhi校园安全，有围墙和安保。德里大城市需注意人身安全。
safetyDetail.en: IIT Delhi campus is secure with walls and guards. Delhi as a big city requires personal safety awareness.

desc.en: India's top research institution. Located in India's Silicon Valley.
desc.zh: 印度顶级研究机构，位于印度硅谷班加罗尔。

climate.zh: 班加罗尔高原气候。全年温和（18-33°C），被称为'花园城市'。雨季6-9月。
climate.en: Bangalore highland climate. Mild year-round (18-33°C), known as 'Garden City'. Rainy season Jun-Sep.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约₹3000-8000/月。班加罗尔生活成本在印度主要城市中适中。
housing.en: On-campus hostels ~₹3000-8000/month. Bangalore cost of living moderate among Indian major cities.

employment.zh: 印度顶尖科研机构。班加罗尔是'印度硅谷'，IT和科技就业极佳。
employment.en: India's top research institution. Bangalore is 'India's Silicon Valley' with excellent IT/tech employment.

healthcare.zh: 校内有健康中心。班加罗尔医疗资源丰富。
healthcare.en: Campus health center. Bangalore has rich medical resources.

application.zh: 本科项目有限，主要通过KVPY/JEE申请。国际生联系招生办。
application.en: Limited undergrad programs, mainly via KVPY/JEE. International students contact admissions.

safetyDetail.zh: 班加罗尔是印度较安全的城市。IISc校园绿树环绕，安保良好。
safetyDetail.en: Bangalore is one of India's safer cities. IISc campus surrounded by greenery with good security.
